summary: Frontend-only testing of Sijill homepage (iteration 12). Login flow, hero section, nav, episodes, Top 5 design all verified. Found 3 confirmed bugs: (1) 6 recommendation cards rendered instead of max 4 despite slice(0,4) in source, (2) badges '↑ 3' (rank 2) and 'Nouveau' (rank 5) in Top 5 not visible — only 'Nº1' (rank 1) badge renders correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: 6 recommendation cards rendered in DOM instead of max 4. Source code has recommendations.slice(0,4) at line 178 of index.tsx, but browser renders all 6 items from API (scrollWidth=1290px = 6x200px cards). Likely Metro bundle cache mismatch — running bundle may not reflect latest source.

Badge '↑ 3' NOT rendered for rank 2 (i=1). Source code has {i === 1 && <Badge label='↑ 3' />} but no element with rgba(4,209,130,0.1) background found in DOM. Only Nº1 badge (rank 1) renders correctly. Likely same Metro bundle cache issue.
ui_bugs.actual: No badge visible, only duration '4min' shown

ui_bugs.issue: Badge 'Nouveau' NOT rendered for rank 5 (i=4). Source code has {i === 4 && <Badge label='Nouveau' />} but text 'Nouveau' not found anywhere in DOM. Same issue as rank 2 badge.
ui_bugs.actual: No badge visible, only duration shown

action_items: Clear Metro bundler cache and restart frontend to ensure latest source code is running: recommendations.slice(0,4) and badges for ranks 2/5 should appear after cache clear
Verify that the following badges render after fix: rank 2 = '↑ 3' (green bg rgba(4,209,130,0.1)), rank 5 = 'Nouveau' (gold bg rgba(201,168,76,0.12))
Verify recommendations section shows max 4 cards after fix
critical_code_review_comments: Metro bundle cache mismatch: source code (index.tsx) has slice(0,4) for recommendations and badges for ranks 2 & 5, but the running bundle renders 6 cards and only shows 1 badge. This is a hot reload / build cache issue that requires metro cache clear.
The arrow character (U+2191) in Badge label '↑ 3' might not render in Cinzel font if the font does not support this glyph — test after cache clear to confirm if this is font or cache issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage testing complete. 3 bugs found. Most likely root cause is Metro bundle cache not reflecting latest code changes. After clearing cache (expo start --clear or equivalent), retest: (1) recommendations count should be 4 not 6, (2) badge '↑ 3' should appear for rank 2, (3) badge 'Nouveau' should appear for rank 5. All other features are working correctly. test_ids: home-ep-*, home-rec-*, home-top5-*, home-hero-title, home-hero-start-btn, home-hero-more-btn, home-search-btn, top-nav. API /api/home returns: recent_episodes=8, recommendations=6, top5_courses=5.

rca_of_issue.bug_description: Metro bundle cache mismatch. The source file /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx has: (1) recommendations.slice(0,4) at line 178, (2) badges for {i===1 and i===4} at lines 244-245. But the running Expo/Metro bundle renders 6 recommendation cards (all from API response of 6) and only shows badge for i===0. This is consistent with the deployed bundle being compiled from an older version of the source, before slice and badges were added.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: Navigate to homepage after login → scroll RECOMMANDÉ POUR VOUS section horizontally → count 6 cards (should be 4). Scroll to TOP 5 → rows 2 and 5 show no badge (only row 1 has Nº1 badge).
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Run expo start with --clear flag to clear Metro bundler cache: cd /app/frontend && npx expo start --clear. Or use supervisor to restart frontend service. Alternatively, touch the file to trigger re-bundle: touch /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx
